projectDescription: A mobile e-commerce app built with React Native and Expo that lets shoppers browse products, manage a cart, check out with PayPal, and track their orders.
keyFeatures: Product browsing with keyword search and pagination
Shopping cart with quantity management and real-time price calculation
Secure checkout flow: shipping address, payment method selection, order review
Order history and order status tracking
Admin panel for managing products, orders, and users
publicApiSurface: GET /api/products — list products with optional keyword and pageNumber filters
POST /api/users/login — authenticate and receive a token
GET /api/orders/mine — get the current user's orders
PUT /api/orders/:id/pay — mark order as paid via PayPal
POST /api/paypal/create-order — create a PayPal payment order
POST /api/paypal/capture-order — capture a completed PayPal payment
